Verified against Jenkins LogRotator API documentation (https://javadoc.jenkins.io/hudson/tasks/LogRotator.html), matches Hudson XML field names used in export_result.sh
Confirmed in export_result.sh comments ('Default to -1 if not found', 'If field is empty in XML, it's effectively -1') and verifier.py treats -1 as blank fields

privileged_info_summary: The configure_log_rotation task requires applying BuildDiscarder/LogRotator settings to three Jenkins jobs. Metadata specifies exact XML field values for daysToKeep, numToKeep, artifactDaysToKeep, and artifactNumToKeep (each job has different configurations). All 12 configuration parameters across the three jobs (nightly-integration-tests, feature-branch-builds, release-pipeline) are verified against Jenkins LogRotator API field names and the verifier.py requirements. The value -1 consistently represents 'not set' across all fields. All metadata values match the verifier expectations and are correct.
